name: the Don is become debt, collector of worlds
text:
the Don do be everywhere now. he is the back room. he is the brown envelope. he is the silence after the question.
every favor ever owed by anyone to anyone is now owed to the Don. this includes favors not yet done. this includes favors in other games. this includes the favor your mother did you by being born.
at the beginning of the end of the beginning, collect. you cannot collect. the debt is larger than the universe and growing. this is fine. the Don finds it relaxing.
flavorText: he made the universe an offer. the universe is still thinking it over. it does not have long.
